error_signature: Conversion error: the string ‘Invalid DateTime’ can’t be converted to a dateTime
title: Invalid DateTime conversion during date comparison
symptom: When running the full workflow, an error occurs stating 'Invalid DateTime' during date comparisons, while single node tests succeed.
applies_when: Using date comparisons in a workflow
not_this_if: Error does not occur in single node tests
root_cause: The error arises because n8n may handle date formats inconsistently between single node tests and full workflow executions. If any date input is null or improperly formatted, it can lead to conversion errors.
fix_steps: Use a Code node to transform and validate date inputs before comparison
Add new fields for comparison to ensure they are correctly formatted
Compare the newly created fields instead of the original dates
agent_instruction: Transform date inputs in a Code node to ensure they are valid before comparison.
